== Notes for [[Item:Q112069|Q112069]] ==

Asura Díaz de Castilla1

b. circa 865?

Father Diego II Rodríguez "Porcelos", conde de Castilla1 b. circa 852, d. 885

Mother Asura Asnurez1 b. circa 845?

Asura Díaz de Castilla was born circa 865?. She was the daughter of Diego II Rodríguez "Porcelos", conde de Castilla and Asura Asnurez.1 Asura Díaz de Castilla married Nuño Nuñez "el de Castrogeriz", señor de Amaya, son of Nuño Nuñez "Rasura", señor de Amaya and Argilo (?), before 885.2,3,1

Family

Nuño Nuñez "el de Castrogeriz", señor de Amaya b. circa 855

Child

Munia domna Nuñez de Amaya+ b. c 885, d. a 5 Aug 9352,4

Citations

[S1316] Reyes y Reinos Genealogias, online www.homar.org, España - 08.A.

[S187] Royal Genealogy Database, online http://www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/public/genealogy/

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 287-38.

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 287-37.

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal11065

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
